messages.content: =Analyze the provided HTML files for the company '{{ $json.store_name }}'.  1. From the Corporate Info HTML, extract company phone, address, logo URL, a clean slogan, and about us description. 2. From the Catalog List HTML, identify all product lists including product names, images, prices, and their parent categories.  Return EXACTLY a valid JSON object matching this schema in a single call to minimize API costs: {   "metadata": {     "slogan": "string",     "about_us": "string",     "address": "string",     "phone": "string",     "logo_url": "string"   },   "products": [     {       "name": "string",       "category": "string",       "image_url": "string",       "description": "string",       "price": 0     }   ] }  Corporate HTML: {{ $json.corporate_html }}  Catalog HTML: {{ $json.catalog_html }}
